---
title: "Var Shortcode Example"
format: html
---

## Using `{{< var >}}` Shortcode

The `{{< var >}}` shortcode reads from `_variables.yml` files in your project.

**Product Information:**

- **Name:** {{< var product.name >}}
- **Version:** {{< var version >}}
- **Description:** {{< var product.description >}}

**Author:**

- **Name:** {{< var author.name >}}
- **Email:** {{< var author.email >}}
- **GitHub:** {{< var author.github >}}

**Links:**

- [Homepage]({{< var urls.homepage >}})
- [Documentation]({{< var urls.docs >}})
- [Report Issues]({{< var urls.issues >}})

## Autocomplete Demo

To try the autocomplete:

1. Place your cursor after `{{< var ` and trigger autocomplete
2. You'll see suggestions like `version`, `product.name`, `author.email`, etc.
